description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 16 cm x 10 cm Created from tough fabric with leather trims Three fold wallet secured by a magnetic closure and a zippered flap Detachable shoulder strap A pocket and a zippered compartment on the left fold Four card holder slots and two pockets on the centre fold Two pockets and three card holder slots with a photo id slot on the right fold A zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
